note: Design-language style prompts prepended to every paper-specific image_prompt at generation time. Edit this file to change the entire collection's visual language.

default.en: Editorial-quality flowchart diagram, hand-drawn line work on warm off-white paper background (#F7F4ED). Two-tone palette of deep Alberta navy (#1A3A6E) for primary nodes and rust orange (#C2491A) for accents and arrows. Boxes have subtle shadows; labels in clean sans-serif; arrows are slightly curved with arrowheads. Architectural, calm, technical but human. Wide editorial aspect. No photo realism, no people, no logos, no watermarks. All text labels in English.
default.fr: Editorial-quality flowchart diagram, hand-drawn line work on warm off-white paper background (#F7F4ED). Two-tone palette of deep Alberta navy (#1A3A6E) for primary nodes and rust orange (#C2491A) for accents and arrows. Boxes have subtle shadows; labels in clean sans-serif; arrows are slightly curved with arrowheads. Architectural, calm, technical but human. Wide editorial aspect. No photo realism, no people, no logos, no watermarks. All text labels in French.

cover.en: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
cover.fr: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.

diagram.en: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
diagram.fr: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

trailer: The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
